hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; ext="${f##*.}"; if [ "$ext" = "ts" ] || [ "$ext" = "tsx" ]; then npx biome check "$f" 2>&1; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; fi; }
npm run lint 2>&1; LINT=$?; npm run typecheck 2>&1; TSC=$?; if [ $LINT -ne 0 ] || [ $TSC -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Checks failed. Fix before finishing."}'; exit 2; fi
